chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. No.D-456 of 2024 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge __________________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. ---- 01.11.2024 Ms. Khadija Kulsoom, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Abdul Samad Khan, Advocate for NADRA. Mr. Muhammad Qasim, DAG. ----- Through the instant petition, the petitioner seeks a direction to respondents No.1 to 3 to renew her CNIC and issue it to her. In response, respondent No.3 (NADRA) has submitted a statement to the effect that, as per the report of V&R Branch, RHO Karachi, the petitioner failed to provide sufficient documents before Zonal Board; hence, her CNIC has been digitally impounded. The statement also indicates that the petitioner’s case was forwarded to the Verifying Agency for further verification, which was received as Unverified. Moreover, she is required to approach concerned DLC for clearance of her CNIC. Learned counsel for the petitioner, after receiving a copy of the aforesaid statement, seeks disposal of this petition with a direction to the DLC to receive the petitioner’s documents for verification purposes and thereafter pass an appropriate order in accordance with the law. Order accordingly. The petition stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Tahseen
